bluetooth_confirm.title: RadiaCode Device Found
bluetooth_confirm.description: Found RadiaCode device **{name}**. Add it to Home Assistant?

user.title: RadiaCode
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth address of your RadiaCode device. You can find it in your phone's Bluetooth settings when paired with the RadiaCode app.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Make sure it is powered on and in range.
